ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was made */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build associated with this release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this release */,
  "branch" TEXT /* The branch from which the build was created */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* The commit hash of the last commit before the build */,
  "deployed_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the release was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the release */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the release was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the release */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "build_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the build */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the build was created */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Current status of the build (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "branch" TEXT /* The branch from which the build was created */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* The commit hash of the last commit before the build */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the build */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the build was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the build */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the build was last updated */,
  "build_type" TEXT /* The type of build (e.g., release, hotfix) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, auditor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the release */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_access_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the note pertains to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the release note detailing changes */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the release note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the release note was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the release note */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the release note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the notification refers to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* The user or group who received the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, unread) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
